film.title: Bade Dil Wala
film.overview: Amrit's generosity and kindness initially lands him in the bad books of a dancer; then in prison; and then as false son-in-law of a very wealthy man.

dialogues.dialogue: Dog! Ingrate! I have lost face in front of Mr Sinha! You have brought shame on me! I'll kill you! - Hold it. I won't reveal this to daddy. But, warn him not to do this again.
I'll kill you! - Hold it. I won't reveal this to daddy. But, warn him not to do this again. I am ashamed of myself! Don't tell Mr Sinha. Please! - Take the truck back. I'll come by car.

Tara? At daytime? (Tara = Star) Oh god! She was right there in the water with you. Shame on you! You ask a young man...where your young and unmarried daughter is? Which is why I tell you not to booze. No time is lost yet. Improve! Go home.

Don't be foolish. I considered it. Then it struck me that it would bring you shame. Till now, to the world, you have presented Amrit as Vijay...Juhi's husband. I care for Juhi, she is my patient. When I found out the truth, I caught hold of him.

I played a mother to you... to sing lullabies for you! I played with you... to substitute for a brother! Today, I feel ashamed to look at you. Don't call me daddy. I don't want to be a father...whose daughter pulls wool over his eyes in the name of her husband. I have a right to say too.

For the sake of my sister's love. I had no selfish motives, daddy! No proud father can tolerate his daughter...pretending to be a wife of a fraud and a killer! He is not a fraud. Nor a killer! Oh! So, he isn't a fraud anymore?
